title: Creating cookies without the HttpOnly flag is security sensitive
description: Leaving the HttpOnly flag off on cookies can lead to client-side script injection vulnerabilities.
message: Cookie created without the HttpOnly flag.
recommendation: Include the HttpOnly flag when creating cookies.

noncompliant.description: Creating a cookie without the HttpOnly flag.

compliant.description: Creating a cookie with the HttpOnly flag.

why_is_this_an_issue: The HttpOnly flag prevents client-side scripts from accessing the cookie, mitigating XSS attacks.
how_to_fix: Always include the HttpOnly flag when creating cookies.
